## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem or use case

Explain the real-world scenario this feature would help with.

## Proposed API or behavior

If you have an API shape, usage example, or UI idea, describe it here.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, or references if they help explain the request.
